response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: 00:00-01:48 involves product introduction and talk. 2. 01:48-03:04 contains a vocal performance. 3. Used lyrics on screen to identify song title as 'ずうりすへ' (To Suuris). 4. Performer is the VTuber 'Su-chan'. 5. Constructed final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a VTuber showcasing merchandise for her birthday event, followed by her original song 'ずうりすへ' (To Suuris).

scenes.description: The VTuber showcases various merchandise for her upcoming birthday event and talks to the viewers. No vocal music is playing.
The VTuber's original song 'ずうりすへ' (To Suuris) begins, with lyrics displayed on the screen as the video concludes.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ずうりすへ
ずっとまっててくれてありがとう
そのまいにちのなかにえらんでくれて
なかなかあえないけれど じまんのあいにきてくれる
これからもよろしくね
おしえてくれた
すうががんばれるのは すうりすのおかげ!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
To Suuris
Thank you for waiting for me
Thank you for choosing me in your daily lives
Although we cannot meet often, you come to see my pride
Please continue to support me
You taught me
The reason Suu can do her best is because of Suuris!!
